source: I will upload the launch brief, meeting notes, a draft customer FAQ, and product screenshots. Please use these documents to create actionable launch preparation materials. Identify primary launch risks, inconsistencies, customer misunderstandings, and unsupported team assumptions. Provide a launch readiness checklist, internal risk memo, customer FAQ, and clear internal summary.
expected_preserved_constraints: preserve checklist memo FAQ and internal summary
notes: Seeded from Text branch launch-triage manual and unit coverage.
